channel.title: Mdt on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Mdt on Have an average day :|

item.title: Adding UltraVNC to WinPE in MDT2012
item.description: So I’ve been trying to update WinPE images to run UltraVNC for the last day. I’m hit a wall where I can’t make it run automagically in the task sequence. I’ve documented some of it on Serverfault. If I figure it out I’ll but everything on the wiki and update this post. However if you have an idea please let me know! -H

item.title: What's the build-id?
item.description: So I’m trying to deploy a custom wim for windows 7 and I keep running into a weird error: Error: Unable to find SETUP , needed to install the image This is what I managed to find and it works really well. http://www.pburch.com/blog/2010/03/05/a-tale-of-build-numbers-and-deployment/ A Tale of Build Numbers and Deployment March 5th, 2010 Posted in MDT, Microsoft, WDS, Windows 7, Work I&# 146;d just like you to know that I&# 146;ve been pulling my hair out all week.

item.title: Windows Deployment Server
item.description: So I’ve learned the in and outs of Windows Deployment over the last 6 months. I’ve studied forums, blogs, etc. I would like to think of my self as a sort of expert in windows deployment technology. I’ve managed to Create a very stable and well performing windows xp image. Now I’m working on a Windows 7 image. However due to money and the ever decreasing budget my company has made the choice to limit our hardware refresh.

item.title: Deploying Windows
item.description: Windows 7! Its here! I’ve been working and playing with windows 7 for a while now. I’m in love with it! Granted I’ll always have my love of Linux. But windows 7 just does what I need it to, when I need it to. The deployment process of it is really interesting to me. I’ve been working with windows deployment and imaging for 2 years now. I dabbled with it before but now I would consider my self an expert at deploying windows xp.
